name: Voice Eight
explanation: A fat unison analog polysynth in the Oberheim Four/Eight Voice lineage. Each voice stacks two detuned sawtooths plus a square sub through a smooth resonant low-pass with its own envelope, with a wide unison Spread for the huge stacked-SEM choir/brass. 8-voice poly. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Spread (unison detune), Sub and Level.
